div.p: Mapping from CH VACD Snomed CT for VaccineCode to http://smt.esante.gouv.fr/terminologie-nuva?vs
Group 1 Mapping from SNOMED CT (all versions) to http://smt.esante.gouv.fr/terminologie-nuva

title.value: ConceptMap for mapping SNOMED-CT vaccine codes to Nuva vaccine codes

description.value: This ConceptMap maps vaccine codes from the SNOMED-CT CodeSystem to the corresponding codes in the Nuva terminology. It is generated based on the provided CSV mapping file and the SNOMED-CT CodeSystem.
